left.content: Pass the harness inside of head cover rib.
Do not pass the harness over head cover rib.
Pass the wire in front of the trunk harness.
Set these clamps before connecting to injector No.1 to No.4.

right.content: Cover the terminal with the cap after tightening.
Keep this wire away from the intake manifold.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Pass this wire on the trunk harness.
Cover the terminal with the cap after tightening.

left.content: Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.

right.content: Set the terminal between the boss and hook.
Set the nail into the body hole.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Fit the stopper to the case.
Fit the stopper to the case.
Do not deform the shape of the terminal when installing.

left.content: Pass the engine harness (to fusible link) through the battery side of fusible link.
Put the cover firmly after confirming that the terminal does not move.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Pass the engine harness (to ECU) through between body ground and current sensor (main harness).

right.content: Lock the hinge of cover after connecting main harness.

left.content: Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.

right.content: Pass the wire under the engine harness.
Pass the harness inside of the hood release cable.
Pass the main ground wire to the body side of the engine harness.

left.content: Pass the branch wire above the main trunk wire.
Locate the branch wire on the panel side of the trunk wire.
Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.

right.content: Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Pass the harness inside of the hood release cable and washer hose.
Set the wire (to side turn (R)) on the washer clamp.
Hook the brake fluid switch wire on the master cylinder.

left.content: Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.

right.content: Fit the terminal to the stopper before tightening the bolt.
Do not deform the shape of the terminal when installing.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Push the wires downward fully to avoid pinching the EPS wire when instrument panel installation.

left.content: Clamp the harness from the outboard side.
Clamp the harness from the bottom side.
Set the connector to the instrument panel main body.
Joint the connector and set the connector after assembling the instrument panel.
Clamp the connector even if the opposite connector is not available.

right.content: Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
TCSS off switch / Sonar and ESP off switch
Joint the connector and set the connector after assembling the instrument panel.
Fit the clamp to the rib.

left.content: Set the clamp from the bottom side.

right.content: Clamp the harness from the outboard side.
Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Do not pinch the wire between the instrument panel main body and side bracket.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Push the wires downward fully to avoid pinching the EPS wire when instrument panel installation.

left.content: Clamp the harness from the outboard side.
Joint the connector and set the connector after assembling the instrument panel.
Clamp the connector even if the opposite connector is not available.
Set the connector to the instrument panel main body.
Set the clamp from the bottom side.

right.content: Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Fit the clamp to the rib.
TCSS off switch / Sonar and ESP off switch
Joint the connector and set the connector after assembling the instrument panel.

left.content: Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.

right.content: Pass the harness under the cable.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Do not pass the front side of the trim board.

left.content: Pass the harness under the washer hose.
Pass the harness under the washer hose.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.
Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Set the terminal to the hole, and tighten the bolt.
Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.

right.content: Pass the harness under the washer hose.

left.content: Confirm that the earth terminals do not move after tightening bolts.

right.content: Avoid that harness is pinched between rear end door trim and rear end door panel.
Rear end door switch and solenoid
Match the rib of grommet to the boss on body panel, and fix it.
Match the rib of grommet to the boss on body panel, and fix it.
